race.description: Vrc Member Erica Mckissack Trophy 3YO Hcp
race.comment: Competitive race and the one with more to offer could be CENSORI (5) off a dominant BM64 win at Sandown Lakeside last time out. She relished the step to a mile there which was no surprise given her breeding and she gets in on the minimum here against a few that may have peaked this preparation. FLYING DONE (3) is perhaps one of those but he ran a much better. race in the Silver Bowl Final behind Clevor Trever last start. Fancy he's looking for firmer ground and he should get that slightly here. FLYING KHAN (8) ran a bottler in the Silver Bowl Final for second at big odds and was only second up. Gets a low draw now and warrants serious respect. THE MEAN FIDDLER (14) was sound in fifth there and has each way claims. CHOWDOWN (6) should appreciate a rise in trip now and could measure up.
